translations.en: Tomorrow and the day after, let's walk together — light and shadow.
translations.pt-BR: Amanhã e depois de amanhã, vamos caminhar juntos — luz e sombra.
translations.es: Mañana y pasado mañana, caminemos juntos — luz y sombra.

literal_meaning.en: like-this + do + te + tomorrow + also + day-after + also + together + let's-walk + light + and + shadow

translations.en: What kind of world was I in, I wonder now.
translations.pt-BR: Em que tipo de mundo eu estava, agora me pergunto.
translations.es: En qué mundo estaba, ahora me pregunto.

literal_meaning.en: what-kind + world + in + exist + past + explanatory + probably + now + think + emphasis

translations.en: If it's with you, we can go anywhere.
translations.pt-BR: Se for com você, podemos ir a qualquer lugar.
translations.es: Si es contigo, podemos ir a cualquier parte.

literal_meaning.en: where + until + even + can-go + you + with + if

translations.en: Even a road I can't walk alone, if there are two of us —
translations.pt-BR: Mesmo um caminho que não posso andar sozinho, se somos dois —
translations.es: Incluso un camino que no puedo andar solo, si somos dos —

literal_meaning.en: alone + if + walk + cannot + road + even + two-people + if

translations.en: — we can walk while humming.
translations.pt-BR: — podemos caminhar cantarolando.
translations.es: — podemos caminar tarareando.

literal_meaning.en: humming + sing + while + can-walk + explanatory + be

translations.en: If you're here, I'm happy.
translations.pt-BR: Se você está aqui, sou feliz.
translations.es: Si estás aquí, soy feliz.

literal_meaning.en: you + subj + exist + if + happiness

translations.en: If the two of us had never met,
translations.pt-BR: Se nós dois nunca tivéssemos nos encontrado,
translations.es: Si los dos nunca nos hubiéramos encontrado,

literal_meaning.en: if + two-people + subj + meet + te + not + past + if

translations.en: — I would have missed so much happiness.
translations.pt-BR: — teria perdido muita felicidade.
translations.es: — me habría perdido mucha felicidad.

literal_meaning.en: many + of + happiness + obj + miss + te + past

translations.en: When I was anxious, you held me tight, didn't you.
translations.pt-BR: Quando eu estava ansioso, você me abraçava forte, né.
translations.es: Cuando estaba ansioso, tú me abrazabas fuerte, ¿verdad?

literal_meaning.en: anxiety + na + time + topic + tightly + do + te + for-me + past + emphasis

translations.en: In a crowd where it seems I'll lose tomorrow,
translations.pt-BR: Numa multidão onde parece que perderei o amanhã,
translations.es: En una multitud donde parece que perderé el mañana,

literal_meaning.en: tomorrow + obj + lose-sight + seems + na + crowd + of + inside

translations.en: In this lonely time where love hurts,
translations.pt-BR: Neste tempo solitário em que o amor dói,
translations.es: En este tiempo solitario donde el amor duele,

literal_meaning.en: love + subj + painful + alone + of + time + topic

translations.en: I had forgotten how to gloss over the loneliness.
translations.pt-BR: Tinha esquecido como disfarçar a solidão.
translations.es: Había olvidado cómo disimular la soledad.

literal_meaning.en: loneliness + obj + deceive + means + obj + forget + te + past

translations.en: Half-and-one shared happiness with you.
translations.pt-BR: Uma metade-uma felicidade compartilhada com você.
translations.es: Una mitad-uno de felicidad compartida contigo.

literal_meaning.en: you + with + half + one + of + happiness

translations.en: A Saturday crowded enough to bump into someone,
translations.pt-BR: Um sábado lotado a ponto de se esbarrar,
translations.es: Un sábado lleno a punto de chocarse,

literal_meaning.en: bump + seems + na + degree + person + many + Saturday

translations.en: Your existence — I don't want to lose sight of it.
translations.pt-BR: Sua existência — não quero perder de vista.
translations.es: Tu existencia — no quiero perderla de vista.

literal_meaning.en: lose-sight + want + not + you + of + existence

translations.en: This moment — twice the strength flowing into our hands.
translations.pt-BR: Neste momento — o dobro da força fluindo para as mãos.
translations.es: En este momento — el doble de fuerza entrando en las manos.

literal_meaning.en: this + moment + times + in + strength + enter + te + -ing + hand + in

translations.en: The warmth and love I felt — no more cry.
translations.pt-BR: O calor e o amor que senti — chega de chorar.
translations.es: La calidez y el amor que sentí — no más llorar.

literal_meaning.en: feel + past + warmth + and + love + no + more + cry

translations.en: Shining in the pocket of faded jeans,
translations.pt-BR: Brilhando no bolso do jeans desbotado,
translations.es: Brillando en el bolsillo de unos jeans desteñidos,

literal_meaning.en: fade + past + jeans + of + pocket + at + shine + te + -ing

translations.en: Your phone — I don't want to make you notice.
translations.pt-BR: Seu celular — não quero que você perceba.
translations.es: Tu móvil — no quiero que lo notes.

literal_meaning.en: you + of + phone + notice + causative + want + not

translations.en: The little devil inside me falls silent.
translations.pt-BR: O pequeno diabo dentro de mim emudece.
translations.es: El diablillo dentro de mí enmudece.

literal_meaning.en: fall-silent + I + of + inside + of + little-devil

translations.en: Just because — if you're not here, I hate it.
translations.pt-BR: Só porque — se você não está, eu odeio.
translations.es: Sólo porque — si no estás, lo odio.

literal_meaning.en: just + you + subj + exist + not + if + unpleasant + be + because

translations.en: I'm scared something will be taken from me.
translations.pt-BR: Tenho medo de que algo me seja tirado.
translations.es: Tengo miedo de que algo me sea arrebatado.

literal_meaning.en: something + subj + take-away + seems + te + scary

translations.en: I want to stay connected to my "precious person".
translations.pt-BR: Quero continuar conectado à "pessoa querida".
translations.es: Quiero seguir conectado con mi "persona importante".

literal_meaning.en: important + na + person + with + connect + te + want

translations.en: My feelings won't lose to anyone.
translations.pt-BR: Meus sentimentos não perdem para ninguém.
translations.es: Mis sentimientos no pierden ante nadie.

literal_meaning.en: feelings + topic + who + to + even + lose + not

translations.en: Yes — let's hold hands enough for this town to hate us.
translations.pt-BR: Sim — vamos dar as mãos a ponto desta cidade nos odiar.
translations.es: Sí — tomémonos de la mano al punto de que esta ciudad nos odie.

literal_meaning.en: so + this + town + by + be-hated + to-extent + hand + obj + let's-join

translations.en: The more cowardly, the more I end up putting on a brave face.
translations.pt-BR: Quanto mais covarde, mais eu acabo fingindo ser forte.
translations.es: Cuanto más cobarde, más termino aparentando fuerza.

literal_meaning.en: coward + na + extent + act-tough + te + end-up

translations.en: But it's impossible... is it okay if I cry?
translations.pt-BR: Mas é impossível... posso chorar?
translations.es: Pero es imposible... ¿puedo llorar?

literal_meaning.en: but + impossible + be + emphasis + cry + te + even + good + Q + I-wonder

translations.en: Autumn wind — soon, the season when we met.
translations.pt-BR: Vento de outono — logo, a estação em que nos conhecemos.
translations.es: Viento de otoño — pronto, la estación en que nos conocimos.

literal_meaning.en: autumn + of + wind + soon + meet + past + season

translations.en: Back then, I was searching for love.
translations.pt-BR: Naquela época, eu procurava o amor.
translations.es: En aquel entonces, yo buscaba el amor.

literal_meaning.en: that + era + of + I + topic + love + obj + search + te + past
